no functions modify state.\n- The code imports 'ethers' utilities, defines static ABI data, and provides factory methods for creating interfaces or connecting to contracts.\n- There are no signs of obfuscation, hardcoded secrets, or dynamic execution.\n- The code does not process untrusted input directly;
